name: Create_Construction_File
description: Generate a DNA cloning construction file, structured paper information resource, or paper-derived construction workflow. For sequence_build, supported assembly_strategy values are only: GoldenGate, Gibson, and TypeIISOligoCloning. For Gibson with auto_design_primers=true, do not ask for primer names/sequences or enzyme; require construct_name, backbone_name, backbone_sequence, insert_name, insert_sequence, and insertion_index. For paper_shorthand, provide only paper_id.

inputs.name: input_mode
inputs.description: Mode of operation. Must be one of: sequence_build, paper_info, paper_shorthand.

inputs.name: construct_name
inputs.description: Name of the final construct. Required for sequence_build.

inputs.name: assembly_strategy
inputs.description: Cloning strategy for sequence_build. Must be one of: GoldenGate, Gibson, TypeIISOligoCloning. Tool names are not valid assembly strategies.

inputs.name: backbone_name
inputs.description: Backbone plasmid name. Required for sequence_build.

inputs.name: backbone_sequence
inputs.description: Backbone DNA sequence, resource name, resource URI, or local FASTA/GenBank path. Required for sequence_build.

inputs.name: insert_name
inputs.description: Insert name. Required for GoldenGate and Gibson.

inputs.name: insert_sequence
inputs.description: Insert DNA sequence, resource name, resource URI, or local FASTA/GenBank path. Required for GoldenGate and Gibson. Not required for TypeIISOligoCloning.

inputs.name: auto_design_primers
inputs.description: For Gibson only. If true, automatically design insert and vector PCR primers. Do not ask the user for primer names or primer sequences when true.

inputs.name: insertion_index
inputs.description: 0-indexed insertion position in the backbone. Required for Gibson when auto_design_primers is true.

inputs.name: overlap_bp
inputs.description: Gibson overlap length in bp. Default 20.

inputs.name: primer_anneal_bp
inputs.description: Number of insert/vector-specific annealing bases in each primer. Default 20.

inputs.name: insert_forward_primer_name
inputs.description: Insert forward primer name. Required for GoldenGate and for Gibson only when auto_design_primers is false.

inputs.name: insert_forward_primer_sequence
inputs.description: Insert forward primer DNA sequence. Required for GoldenGate and for Gibson only when auto_design_primers is false.

inputs.name: insert_reverse_primer_name
inputs.description: Insert reverse primer name. Required for GoldenGate and for Gibson only when auto_design_primers is false.

inputs.name: insert_reverse_primer_sequence
inputs.description: Insert reverse primer DNA sequence. Required for GoldenGate and for Gibson only when auto_design_primers is false.

inputs.name: vector_forward_primer_name
inputs.description: Vector forward primer name. Required for GoldenGate and for Gibson only when auto_design_primers is false.

inputs.name: vector_forward_primer_sequence
inputs.description: Vector forward primer DNA sequence. Required for GoldenGate and for Gibson only when auto_design_primers is false.

inputs.name: vector_reverse_primer_name
inputs.description: Vector reverse primer name. Required for GoldenGate and for Gibson only when auto_design_primers is false.

inputs.name: vector_reverse_primer_sequence
inputs.description: Vector reverse primer DNA sequence. Required for GoldenGate and for Gibson only when auto_design_primers is false.

inputs.name: top_oligo_name
inputs.description: Top oligo name. Required for TypeIISOligoCloning.

inputs.name: top_oligo_sequence
inputs.description: Top oligo DNA sequence. Required for TypeIISOligoCloning.

inputs.name: bottom_oligo_name
inputs.description: Bottom oligo name. Required for TypeIISOligoCloning.

inputs.name: bottom_oligo_sequence
inputs.description: Bottom oligo DNA sequence. Required for TypeIISOligoCloning.

inputs.name: enzyme
inputs.description: Restriction enzyme. Required for GoldenGate and TypeIISOligoCloning. Not required for Gibson.

inputs.name: cell_strain
inputs.description: Optional transformation host strain.

inputs.name: selection
inputs.description: Optional selection marker.

inputs.name: temperature_c
inputs.description: Optional transformation temperature in Celsius.

inputs.name: paper_id
inputs.description: Required for paper_shorthand. Identifier for a curated paper resource.

inputs.name: paper_info_json
inputs.description: Optional full paper information object returned from get_paper_info.

outputs.description: Structured construction file, construction file text, or paper-derived construction workflow.
